ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the trade in milliseconds */,
  "pnl" REAL /* Profit and loss (PnL) of the trade */,
  "fee_paid" REAL /* Fee paid for the trade */,
  "balance" REAL /* Balance after the trade */,
  "equity" REAL /* Equity after the trade */,
  "pbr" REAL /* Price-to-book ratio (PBR) of the trade */,
  "qty" REAL /* Quantity of the asset traded */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the asset traded */,
  "psize" REAL /* Position size of the trade */,
  "pprice" REAL /* Position price of the trade */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., long entry partial, long re-entry full) */,
  "adg" REAL /* Average daily gain (ADG) of the trade */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset traded */,
  "trade_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade type */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who executed the trade */,
  "trade_status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., open, closed, pending) */,
  "trade_comment" TEXT /* Comment or description of the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_trade_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_type_id") REFERENCES trade_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assets" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset */,
  "asset_name" TEXT /* Name of the asset */,
  "asset_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the asset (e.g., AAPL, USD) */,
  "asset_exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the asset is traded (e.g., NYSE, NASDAQ) */,
  "asset_sector" TEXT /* Sector of the asset (e.g., technology, finance) */,
  "asset_type" TEXT /* Type of the asset (e.g., stock, bond, currency) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the asset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the trade type (e.g., long entry partial, long re-entry full) */,
  "type_description" TEXT /* Description of the trade type */,
  "type_risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level of the trade type (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "trading_experience" TEXT /* Trading experience level of the user (e.g., beginner, intermediate, advanced) */,
  "risk_tolerance" TEXT /* Risk tolerance level of the user (e.g., conservative, moderate, aggressive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade history entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who executed the trade */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the trade */,
  "trade_history_type" TEXT /* Type of trade history (e.g., buy, sell, update) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_history_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trades ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_management" (
  "risk_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk management setting */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the risk setting */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level of the user (e.g., conservative, moderate, aggressive) */,
  "stop_loss" REAL /* Stop loss level for the user */,
  "take_profit" REAL /* Take profit level for the user */,
  "risk_strategy" TEXT /* Risk management strategy (e.g., hedging, diversification) */,
  "risk_parameters" TEXT /* Risk management parameters (e.g., stop loss, take profit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("risk_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_management_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., large loss, unusual market activity) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "notification_priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the notification (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "read_status" TEXT /* Read status of the notification (e.g., read, unread) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
